title: CrMenu
description: The best menu plugins for your fully configurable server • Supports fully customizable heads
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/179f8bc4a0905b73557d58b9f205d16cba7513a5.jpeg)

# 📥 Installation Guide Copy the .jar file to the plugins folder on your server. Start the server to generate the configuration and language files. Menus configurable via files in plugins/CrMenu/menus. ## Features First public version of CrMenu. Menus configurable via files in plugins/CrMenu/menus. Support for permissions and documented commands. Integration with PlaceholderAPI with key variables. Supports custom headers. Link to compatible headers. https://minecraft-heads.com/custom-heads ## Commands : /menu: opens the main menu /menu [id]: opens the main menu or the menu with identifier [id] /crmenu reload: reloads configuration and menus without restarting the server /crmenu diag: displays a diagnostic report of the configuration /crmenu regen: regenerates config.yml from the JAR and reloads it ## Permissions: • crmenu.open: allows the menu to be opened (default true for all). • crmenu.reload: reload and maintenance (default op). • crmenu.diag: diagnostics (default op). • Configurable in config.yml under permissions: command_open, admin_reload, admin_diag. • By menu: permission_open in each .yml file of the menu to restrict opening. • By item: permission in each item entry to control individual clicks.
